sources.sourceType: official artist social profile linked by established music publication
sources.evidence: Beat Magazine's Melbourne gig listing links The Fakeaways name directly to this Instagram profile and describes the band's covers-and-originals repertoire.

sources.sourceType: established Melbourne music publication gig feature
sources.evidence: Beat Magazine identifies The Fakeaways on a 5 July 2024 Hawthorn Hotel bill and describes them as playing covers and originals blending blues, soul and rock'n'roll.
